children.text: We usually have 3 meals a day.
In the morning, we usually have something simple and warm, like soy milk and steamed buns.
children.keywords: morning, simple, soy milk, steamed buns

children.text: For lunch, we eat many different kinds of food.
We often have rice with meat and vegetables, but my favorite is oil-splashed noodles.
In the evening, my family sits together to have a big dinner with many hot dishes.
children.keywords: evening, together, big dinner, hot dishes

children.text: Of course, we use chopsticks to eat our meals every day, which is a very important part of Chinese food culture.
